name: Can I use AI to write SEO content, or will that hurt me?
description: You can use AI to draft SEO content, but it needs human editing. Accuracy, usefulness, and clear structure matter more than whether AI helped produce the first

mainEntity.name: Can I use AI to write SEO content, or will that hurt me?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, but only if the page structure is clear and the content is genuinely useful. AI can help draft FAQ blocks, meta descriptions, and outlines, but those drafts should be edited for accuracy, relevance, and brand voice.
acceptedAnswer.description: You can use AI to draft SEO content, but it needs human editing. Accuracy, usefulness, and clear structure matter more than whether AI helped produce the first draft.
